Basic Calculator

Display Options

Display Mode

Switch between the mobile app layout and the desktop dashboard.

Demo Mode

Show balances at a percentage of real values for screenshots/demos. Disables data export.

Full Screen

Enter full screen mode. Or hold anywhere on screen for 5 seconds.

Splash Screen

Show the animated intro screen when opening the app.

Data Management

Save Data

Download all your accounts and entries as a backup file.

Load Data

Restore from a previously saved backup file.

🎯 Fix Goal Status

Reset a goal year that shows incorrectly as completed or stuck. Choose the year to un-complete.

Delete All Data

Permanently removes all entries, accounts, and institutions.

Change PIN

⚠️

Are you sure?

This will permanently delete all entries, accounts, and institutions. This cannot be undone.

🎲 Monte Carlo Retirement Simulator

Coast Plan Simulation

Run simulation using your Coast Plan values: retirement age, monthly contributions, and expected returns.

Custom Scenario

Setup a custom scenario with your own parameters for retirement age, portfolio size, and expenses.

Runs 10,000 simulations to estimate your probability of not running out of money before death. Uses stochastic modeling for investment returns, inflation, and market volatility.

    About

    Sommerville Ledger — Personal wealth tracker with AES-256 encryption. All data stored locally on your device.

    Saves a .txt file with CSS vars, JS helper values, chart instances, and localStorage state — useful for diagnosing theme issues.

    🤖
    Built with Claude
    AI coding engine by Anthropic — designed, written, and iterated entirely through conversation.
